description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray chassis and a black keyboard. The device features a large display with thin bezels, and the screen is shown powered on, running the Blender 3D software interface. The keyboard is a full QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad, and the touchpad is positioned slightly left of center below the keyboard. Several ports are visible along the left and right edges, including USB, HDMI, and audio jacks. The laptop's lid is plain with no visible branding, and there are a couple of stickers on the palm rest area, likely indicating hardware specifications. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for both work and creative tasks.
description: A sleek, metallic gray laptop with a black keyboard, large display, and visible ports and stickers. The screen is on, displaying the Blender 3D software interface.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the keyboard, touchpad, and several ports including USB and HDMI.
description_view_1: Rear view of the closed laptop lid, which is plain and metallic gray with no visible branding.
description_view_2: Right side view highlighting the keyboard, touchpad, and additional ports.
description_view_3: Front view showing the open screen displaying Blender, full keyboard with numeric keypad, and stickers on the palm rest.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying the Blender 3D software interface with multiple windows visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad; standard English language keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers are present on the right palm rest area, one blue and one white, likely indicating hardware specifications.
